notes:
What's new in 1.2.8:
- User guide is now native HTML with proper in-app navigation instead of rendered Markdown.
- Release scripts now enforce that the user guide and app version are updated together before a release can be published.

Also new in 1.2.7 (if upgrading from 1.2.6 or earlier):
- Tools menu replaces the Settings menu - Tools > Settings... opens the Performance and Privacy dialog.
- Bulk export now follows filtered rows: Download All and Export All Matches operate on what's currently visible.
- Search has a single Match Order control, x of y visible result feedback, and stacked result filters.
